positive: A central, stylized minimalist fox spirit silhouette howling at a crescent moon. The fox is composed of clean, flowing lines and sharp angles, embodying mystical energy. The background features a stylized cosmic nebula gradient of deep indigo, ethereal lavender, and hints of shimmering gold dust. Emphasize negative space, high contrast black ink against vibrant, gradient colors. Composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for repeating or single placement apparel prints. Clean vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, highly detailed, symmetrical design. Digital illustration, volumetric lighting, ultra high quality, trending on ArtStation.
